description: Deploy the v3 logo lockup and refreshed brand palette across the Beacon production storefront header and footer. Scope is limited to theme assets; rollback plan attached. Requested by Laura Mitchell.

description: Increase Okta SSO session lifetime for the external-vendors group to match the standard policy and stop premature Figma re-auth. Rollback plan attached. Requested by Harlan Boyd.
short_description: Change request - Adjust vendor SSO session lifetime

description: Provision standardized Box and Confluence scopes for the external-vendors onboarding template. Low scope; reversible via group policy. Requested by Andre Foster.
short_description: Change request - Standardize vendor access template

description: Update the storefront image pipeline to preserve high-resolution hero assets and raise the compression quality threshold. Rollback plan attached. Requested by Laura Mitchell.
short_description: Change request - Adjust image pipeline compression

description: Add the campaign web font to the CDN allowlist and warm the cache so staging and production render the correct typeface. Reversible. Requested by Marcus Webb.
short_description: Change request - Add campaign web font to CDN

description: Deduplicate UTM source rules in the Salesforce campaign dashboard and correct the date-range filter binding in Tableau. Rollback plan attached. Requested by Priya Raman.
short_description: Change request - Fix analytics dashboard data quality

description: Raise the vendor VPN idle timeout and adjust MTU to stop drops during large uploads. Reversible profile change. Requested by Laura Mitchell.
short_description: Change request - Tune vendor VPN for large uploads

description: Reroute Okta MFA push delivery for external accounts through the secondary provider to improve reliability. Rollback plan attached. Requested by Harlan Boyd.
short_description: Change request - Reroute vendor MFA push delivery

description: Replace the outdated brand guidelines PDF on the vendor portal with the current export and pin it as the canonical reference. Low scope. Requested by Laura Mitchell.

description: Migrate the Asana rebrand board notifications to the corrected email relay so vendor handoff pings deliver. Reversible. Requested by Laura Mitchell.
short_description: Change request - Fix Asana notification relay

description: Schedule a Beacon staging refresh from production for the upcoming holiday-campaign rehearsal so vendor previews use current data. Rollback by snapshot. Requested by Marcus Webb.
short_description: Change request - Refresh staging for campaign rehearsal

description: Grant a scoped, time-boxed guest Slack channel for the print vendor coordinating holiday packaging, expiring after the run. Reversible. Requested by Marcus Webb.
short_description: Change request - Time-boxed guest Slack for print vendor
